use_cases: Displaying user transaction history with avatars, descriptions, and currency amounts in a fintech dashboard
Showing recent activity feeds in a SaaS application with animated list item reveals
Rendering e-commerce order activity with staggered spring animations for visual polish
Displaying notification or event logs with formatted currency and date information
ai_summary: A shadcn-style activity list component featuring Framer Motion animations for staggered list item reveals. Displays activity items with avatars, names, descriptions, formatted currency amounts, and dates. Uses spring-based animations with opacity and y-axis transitions. Ideal for fintech dashboards, e-commerce order tracking, or SaaS activity feeds. Styled with flat design principles using shadcn's card utilities and border styling.
